name: Byron Hills Golf Course
about: Byron Hills Golf Course features an 18-hole championship course suitable for all skill levels, with spacious fairways, smooth greens, and modern amenities. The venue includes a fully stocked pro shop, an expansive practice facility, and a clubhouse with dining options. An indoor golf simulator area provides climate-controlled play with 3Trak launch monitors and a fully stocked bar, making it suitable for individual practice, group outings, and special events regardless of weather conditions. Season passes are available for unlimited play throughout the season.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator with 3Trak launch monitors
Fully stocked bar available during simulator sessions
Climate-controlled simulator space for year-round play
Flexible season pass options for unlimited play

food_and_drink.notes: Clubhouse with dining options and snack bar available
Fully stocked bar in the simulator area

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art launch monitors for swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify if club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks policies aren't specified, but the venue offers a fully stocked bar and dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes isn't specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Byron Hills is suitable for families and mentions being beginner-friendly, making it appropriate for junior golfers.
